description_long: This object is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a prominent pistol grip. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of various optics and accessories. The handguard is ribbed and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, providing ample grip surface and additional mounting points. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, inserted just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a flash suppressor or muzzle brake. The overall design is utilitarian, with ergonomic contours and robust construction typical of contemporary military or law enforcement firearms.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, and detachable magazine, featuring a long barrel and full-length accessory rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, ribbed handguard, and long barrel with flash suppressor.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, narrow barrel, and the symmetry of the handguard and rail system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock contours.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the upper receiver, with the pistol grip and magazine visible below.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and finger grooves for secure handling. Its surface features a stippled or textured pattern, likely molded into the polymer for enhanced grip, and the material appears to be a matte black synthetic. The backstrap is slightly arched, and the front strap is straight, both designed for comfort and control. There are no visible logos or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian, tactical appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and slightly oversized, with a rounded front and reinforced lower edge. It is thick enough to accommodate gloved fingers and features a smooth, matte finish. The guard is integrated seamlessly into the lower receiver, with no visible undercuts or squared-off edges, prioritizing strength and simplicity.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the handguard, and terminates in a flash suppressor or muzzle brake. It has a standard, non-fluted profile with a matte black finish, and no visible threading or porting. The exterior is smooth, with no markings or decorative features.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible slide markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the upper receiver or barrel in the provided images. The surfaces appear clean and unadorned, with a focus on function over decoration.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly beveled at the edges, with a subtle extension beyond the magazine body for easy removal. It is constructed from the same matte black polymer as the grip, with no visible finger rests, logos, or additional texturing.
